# MetalForge — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/
# Last updated: 2026-07-12
# Content: 67 drummers, 157 lick pages (100% coverage), 447 articles, 29 techniques, 35 bands, 226 comparisons, 56 pedal setups

> MetalForge is the definitive database of professional metal drummers and their gear. 67 drummers, complete gear specs, 157 signature drum lick breakdowns, performance videos, and career histories.

## Core

- [Drummer Database](/llms/index.md): Complete AI-readable index of all content
- [All Drummers](/llms/drummers/): 67 per-drummer gear, bio, FAQ profiles
- [Gear Guide](/llms/gear-guide.md): Drum brands and equipment overview
- [Gear by Brand](/llms/gear-by-brand.md): Brand → drummer mapping
- [Endorsements Database](/llms/endorsements.md): Cross-brand endorsement index for 67 metal drummers
- [FAQ](/llms/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about metal drummer gear

## Signature Licks (100% coverage — 67 drummers)

- [Licks Overview](/llms/licks.md): All signature drum lick patterns
- [Per-Drummer Licks](/llms/licks/): 51+ per-drummer lick breakdowns (blast beats, double bass, iconic fills)

## Techniques

- [Techniques Overview](/llms/techniques.md): Metal drumming techniques explained
- [Per-Technique Guides](/llms/technique/): 29 techniques covering blast beat, double bass, gravity blast, polyrhythms, and 25 more including rudiments, paradiddles, and stroke rolls

## Genres

- [Genre Guides](/llms/genres/): Per-genre drumming guides covering featured drummers, techniques, gear, and FAQ — thrash, death, black, progressive, nu-metal, groove, metalcore, hardcore, technical-death (9 files)

## Bands & Comparisons

- [Metal Bands](/llms/bands.md): 35 curated bands with drummer lineups and gear
- [Comparisons Overview](/llms/comparisons.md): Side-by-side drummer gear comparisons
- [Per-Comparison Pages](/llms/vs/): 226 individual drummer-vs-drummer comparisons
- [Comparison Q&A Pages](/llms/comparisons/): 26 structured Q&A drummer comparison pages

## Content Articles

- [Articles](/llms/articles/): 447 album drum setup breakdowns, gear guides, and technique lick guides (Painkiller, Master of Puppets, Black Album, etc.)

## Lists & Reference

- [Top-10 Lists](/llms/lists.md): Best death metal, thrash metal, most innovative, fastest drummers, best double bass, and 12 more ranked lists
- [Best Death Metal Drummers](/llms/lists/best-death-metal-drummers.md): George Kollias, Gene Hoglan, Pete Sandoval — complete ranked guide with FAQ
- [Best Thrash Metal Drummers](/llms/lists/best-thrash-metal-drummers.md): Dave Lombardo, Lars Ulrich, Charlie Benante — definitive thrash ranking with FAQ
- [Most Innovative Metal Drummers](/llms/lists/most-innovative-metal-drummers.md): Danny Carey, Tomas Haake, Brann Dailor — innovation history with FAQ
- [Facts](/llms/facts.md): Metal drummer quick facts database
- [Quiz](/llms/quiz.md): Metal drum kit quiz content

## Tools

- [Tools Guide](/llms/tools/): MetalForge drummer tools description

## Drumsticks

- [Drumsticks Guide](https://metalforge.io/drumsticks): Sizes, materials, and tips explained, plus which mapped drummers play what
- [Drumstick Brands](https://metalforge.io/drumsticks/brands): Positioning, notable metal-relevant lines, and confirmed drummer usage for 10 major drumstick brands (Vic Firth, Vater, Pro-Mark, Ahead, Zildjian, Los Cabos, Regal Tip, Meinl, Wincent, Tama)
- [Best Drumsticks for Metal](https://metalforge.io/drumsticks/best-for-metal): Why metal favours heavier 5B/2B, front-weighted, durable sticks, with confirmed signature-stick recommendations
- [Signature Stick Pages](https://metalforge.io/drumsticks/signature/): Per-drummer "what drumsticks does X use" pages for every drummer with a verified stick mapping
- [Per-Drummer Signature Stick Markdown Files](/llms/drumsticks/signature/): 30 per-drummer "what drumsticks does X use" markdown pages, one per drummer with a verified signature/endorsed stick

## Cymbals

- [Cymbals Guide](https://metalforge.io/cymbals): Types, alloys, and sizes/weights explained, plus which mapped drummers play what
- [Cymbal Setups Index](/llms/cymbals.md): All 56 verified drummer cymbal setups, linked to their profiles
- [Cymbal Brands](https://metalforge.io/cymbals/brands): Positioning and metal-relevant series for Zildjian, Paiste, Sabian, and Meinl, plus confirmed drummer usage
- [Best Cymbals for Metal](https://metalforge.io/cymbals/best-for-metal): Why metal favours brighter/cutting or heavier setups, with recommended series by budget tier

## Snares

- [Snares Guide](https://metalforge.io/snares): Shell materials, sizes, and tuning for metal explained, plus which mapped drummers play what
- [Snares Index](/llms/snares.md): All 56 verified drummer snares, linked to their profiles
- [Snare Brands](https://metalforge.io/snares/brands): Positioning and metal-relevant models for Tama, Pearl, Ludwig, Sonor, Mapex, and DW, plus confirmed drummer usage
- [Signature Snare Pages](https://metalforge.io/snares/signature/): Per-drummer "what snare does X use" pages for every drummer with a verified signature snare
- [Per-Drummer Signature Snares](/llms/snares/signature/): 10 per-drummer "what snare does X use" markdown pages, one per drummer with a confirmed signature snare model
- [Best Snares for Metal](https://metalforge.io/snares/best-for-metal): Why metal favours high-tension metal shells (with wood-shell exceptions), with recommendations anchored on the verified signature snares

## Pedals

- [Pedals Guide](https://metalforge.io/pedals): Chain vs belt vs direct drive, single vs double pedals, and setup/tuning explained, plus which mapped drummers play what
- [Pedals Hub](/llms/pedals.md): All 56 verified drummer pedal setups plus links to all 3 reference guides, linked to their profiles
- [Pedal Reference Guides](/llms/pedals/): Drive types, single-vs-double, and setup & tuning — one markdown file per guide
- [Per-Drummer Pedal Setups](/llms/pedals/setups/): 56 per-drummer "what pedals does X use" markdown pages, one per drummer with a verified pedal

## Brands

- [Tama Drums — Endorsers](/llms/brands/tama.md): 17 metal drummer endorsers, Starclassic Maple/Bubinga, Iron Cobra pedals
- [Pearl Drums — Endorsers](/llms/brands/pearl.md): 18 metal drummer endorsers, Reference/Masterworks series, Demon Drive pedals
- [DW Drums — Endorsers](/llms/brands/dw.md): Collectors Series, 9000 series pedals, 19+ hardware endorsers
- [Ludwig Drums — Endorsers](/llms/brands/ludwig.md): Classic Maple, Supraphonic snare, Bill Ward / Art Cruz
- [Mapex Drums — Endorsers](/llms/brands/mapex.md): Saturn V, Black Panther Design Lab, Chris Adler / Jason Bittner
- [Meinl Cymbals — Endorsers](/llms/brands/meinl.md): 10 metal drummer endorsers, Byzance Dark/Extra Dry series
- [Zildjian Cymbals — Endorsers](/llms/brands/zildjian.md): 20 metal drummer endorsers, A Custom/K/K Custom series
- [Paiste Cymbals — Endorsers](/llms/brands/paiste.md): 14 metal drummer endorsers, RUDE/2002/Giant Beat/Signature series

## Optional

- [Gear Series](/llms/gear-series/): ~20 per-series gear breakdowns
- [Full Text Dump](/llms-full.txt): Complete content for single-request ingestion
